**Breeze**, born **Ladrian**, is a half-skaa Misting and member of [[Kelsier\|Kelsier's]] crew on [[Scadrial\|Scadrial]]. He is a [[Soother\|Soother]].

## Appearance and Personality
Breeze presents himself as a nobleman: tailored suits, dueling cane, wine. He is verbose and theatrical.

## Attributes and Abilities
As a Soother he burns [[Brass\|brass]] to suppress specific emotions in a target. He is regarded as one of the most skilled Soothers in [[Luthadel\|Luthadel]].
